LanguageData.RB_GravshipPanoramaHull.description: A massive glass facade offers an uninterrupted view of space. Built as part of the gravship’s substructure, this airtight hall combines structural integrity with breathtaking visibility. Only constructible on a gravship.
LanguageData.RB_GravshipPanoramaHull.label: gravship panorama hull
LanguageData.RB_GravshipWindowHull.description: An airtight wall embedded with pressure-resistant viewing windows. Designed for safe stargazing, this hall integrates directly into the gravship’s structural framework. Can only be constructed on a gravship.
LanguageData.RB_GravshipWindowHull.label: gravship glasshull
LanguageData.RB_SmoothGravshipHull.description: A weaker airtight wall that prevents oxygen leaks in the vacuum of space. The wall connects directly into the underlying substructure, meaning it can only be built on a gravship.
LanguageData.RB_SmoothGravshipHull.label: gravship hull
